title: sticherus longipinnatus
intro: Sticherus longipinnatus, also known as the Chinese fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sticherus longipinnatus include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
